synopsis: "The Weapons Master!" is a short comic in which Princess Leia Organa recounts the story of how Giles Durane, the "Weapons Master," trained her to defend herself. The story first appeared in three parts in Marvel UK's Star Wars Weekly 104–106, and was reprinted in Marvel Illustrated Books' Star Wars. It was named after the first part, originally published in Star Wars Weekly 104. The other two parts were "Day of the Assassins!" and "My Enemies Surround Me!."
title: The Weapons Master!
